scripts.test: bun --cwd apps/webapp test && bun --cwd packages/ingestor test
scripts.lint: bun --cwd apps/webapp lint && bun --cwd packages/ingestor lint
scripts.fmt: bun --cwd apps/webapp fmt && bun --cwd packages/ingestor fmt
scripts.typecheck: bun --cwd apps/webapp typecheck && bun --cwd packages/ingestor typecheck
